description: A client submits a request to set up all necessary accounts and hardware for a new employee starting next week.

nodes.task_description: Log a new ticket using the 'New Hire' template.

expected_outcome.value: A new ticket with a checklist of new-hire tasks is created.

nodes.task_description: Create a new user account in the client's Active Directory and Microsoft 365 tenant.

expected_outcome.value: The user account, email, and basic group memberships are created.

nodes.task_description: Configure a new laptop for the user by deploying the standard client image.

expected_outcome.value: A new laptop is prepared with all standard company software and settings.
